chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1101 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.4584/2023 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case 22.08.2023 Mr. Arif Ali Abbasi, Advocate for the Petitioner >>>>>>>...<<<<<<< This petition has been filed by the petitioner for directions to the Land Revenue Officers for demarcation. The case of the petitioner is that he has already filed an application before Assistant Commissioner Pano Akil dated 15.04.2023 for the same purpose, but without any result. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, learned Assistant Advocate General Sindh waives notice of this application and with consent this petition is disposed of by directing Assistant Commissioner, Pano Akil to decide the application of the petitioner within a period of one month and submit compliance report to this Court. Let a copy of this order be supplied to learned AAG Sindh for perusal and compliance. Judge Judge ARBROHI
